task_description: Phase 23 - QuantDocs (Google Docs Killer): Create apps/quantdocs/ with complete backend services for document CRUD with versioning, Yjs real-time collaboration, presence/cursors, comments/suggestions, AI writing features (write from outline, expand, simplify, translate, grammar, table-from-text, diagram-from-text), export (PDF/DOCX/Markdown/HTML/LaTeX), and templates. All services must have tests, TypeScript strict, vitest passes.
